positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed graphic illustration of a celestial forest at twilight. The scene features stylized, towering flora (mangroves, ferns) silhouetted against a large, glowing full moon and distant constellation patterns. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and Neo-Victorian etching, rendered with stark, clean linework and deep, symbolic negative space. Use a limited, elegant color palette of deep indigo, burnt gold, and cream. The composition must be perfectly centered, maximizing contrast and maintaining a decorative, tattoo-sheet aesthetic, ideal for high-quality apparel printing. Emphasize repeating geometric patterns in the background ether.
